'''Jack Smith''' (born 29 April 2005) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|wg}}er or {{rlp|ce}} for the [[York Knights]] in the [[Betfred Super League]].

He has spent time on loan from the [[Leeds Rhinos]] at the [[Halifax Panthers]] and the [[Bradford Bulls]] in the [[RFL Championship]]. Smith has also played on loan from [[Leeds Rhinos|Leeds]] at the [[London Broncos]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]], winning the RFL Championship Young Player of the Year in 2025.

==Background==
Smith was born in [[Pontefract, West Yorkshire]], England

He grew up playing [[rugby union]] as a youth, and also played [[rugby league]] for [[Featherstone Lions]] as a junior.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.yorkshireeveningpost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/leeds-rhinos-news-out-of-contract-back-set-for-move-to-super-league-hopefuls-5343975|title=Out of contract Leeds Rhinos back set for move to Super League hopefuls|date=October 2, 2025|website=Yorkshire Evening Post}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.yorkrlfc.com/post/knights-welcome-smith-to-york|title=Knights welcome Smith to York!|date=October 15, 2025|website=York RLFC}}</ref> 

Smith played for the England Academy side.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.therhinos.co.uk/article/19113/three-rhinos-named-in-england-rugby-league-academy-squad-|title=Three Rhinos named in England Rugby League Academy squad|website=www.therhinos.co.uk}}</ref>

==Career==
Smith made his professional debut in March 2024 on loan at the [[Halifax Panthers]] against the [[Bradford Bulls]] in the [[2024 RFL Championship|Championship]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.therhinos.co.uk/article/21850/jack-smith-joins-london-broncos-on-loan|title=Jack Smith joins London Broncos on loan|website=www.therhinos.co.uk}}</ref>

He spent time in 2024 on loan at [[Bradford Bulls|Bradford]] in the Championship.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://bradfordbulls.co.uk/article/2656/bulls-sign-smith-on-loan-from-rhinos|title=BULLS SIGN SMITH ON LOAN FROM RHINOS|website=bradfordbulls.co.uk}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.thetelegraphandargus.co.uk/sport/sportlatest/24493925.bradford-bulls-loan-leeds-rhinos-outside-back-jack-smith/|title=Buzzing Bulls loan in Leeds talent Smith on Deadline Day|date=August 2, 2024|website=Bradford Telegraph and Argus}}</ref>

In May 2025 Smith was sent on loan to the [[London Broncos]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.yorkshireeveningpost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/leeds-rhinos-man-joins-london-broncos-along-with-wigan-warriors-rookie-5152041|title=Leeds Rhinos man joins London Broncos along with Wigan Warriors rookie|date=May 29, 2025|website=Yorkshire Evening Post}}</ref> He won the RFL Championship Young Player of the Year in 2025.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.yorkshireeveningpost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/leeds-rhinos-youngster-honoured-as-ex-castleford-tigers-rhinos-duo-up-for-top-championship-award-5338373|title=Leeds Rhinos youngster wins award as ex-Castleford Tigers & Rhinos duo up for top Championship honour|date=September 29, 2025|website=Yorkshire Evening Post}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.rugby-league.com/article/64219/betfred-championship-awards-2025|title=Betfred Championship Awards 2025|website=www.rugby-league.com}}</ref>

Smith joined the [[York Knights]] after his [[Leeds Rhinos|Leeds]] contract expired at the end of the 2025 season.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.yorkshireeveningpost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/out-of-contract-leeds-rhinos-youngster-joins-super-league-hopefuls-5360700|title=Out of contract Leeds Rhinos youngster joins Super League hopefuls|date=October 15, 2025|website=Yorkshire Evening Post}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.yorkpress.co.uk/sport/25546203.york-knights-sign-leeds-rhinos-youngster-jack-smith/|title=Knights sign Championship Young Player of the Year Smith for 2026|date=October 15, 2025|website=York Press}}</ref>
